workHistory.title: Chief Financial Officer
workHistory.achievements:
•  Streamlined financial processes by implementing new accounting software and automation techniques. 
•  Directed budget development, budgetary controls and recordkeeping to make informed financial decisions. 
•  Advised the Board of Director on strategic financial matters, providing insightful recommendations backed by thorough analysis. 
•  Oversaw budgets, payroll, and accounts payable and receivable. 
•  Conducted detailed analysis of company financial information and oversaw preparation of related reports. 
•  Championed effective communication between finance personnel and other departments to facilitate cross-functional collaboration on projects and initiatives. 
•  Established strong relationships with external stakeholders, including investors, analysts, and regulatory agencies to promote transparency and build trust in the organization''s financial management.

workHistory.title: Vice President of Finance
workHistory.achievements:
•  Negotiated favorable contracts with suppliers, reducing costs while maintaining product quality. 
•  Conducted target market research to scope out industry competition and identify advantageous trends. 
•  Led the strategic planning process to define business goals and ensure alignment across all departments. 
•  Created and monitored promotional approaches to increase sales and profit levels. 
•  Oversaw financial management activities such as budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow monitoring for improved financial stability. 
•  Delivered outstanding service to customers to maintain and extend relationships for future business opportunities. 
•  Maintained detailed records of project progress, expenses, and communications for accurate invoicing and future reference. 
•  Increased client satisfaction by delivering high-quality projects on time and within budget constraints. 
•  Revamped budgeting frameworks to enhance cash flow transparency, resulting in improved investment readiness and strengthened stakeholder confidence.

workHistory.title: Independent Consultant
workHistory.achievements:
•  Delivered outstanding service to customers to maintain and extend relationships for future business opportunities. 
•  Maintained detailed records of project progress, expenses, and communications for accurate invoicing and future reference. 
•  Increased client satisfaction by delivering high-quality projects on time and within budget constraints. 
•  Communicated effectively with clients throughout the entire project lifecycle, keeping them informed of progress updates or any potential issues that arose. 
•  Offered creative problem-solving techniques when faced with unexpected obstacles during the course of a project.

workHistory.title: Head of Marketing
workHistory.achievements:
•  Spearheaded the overall marketing strategy for one of Cebu's largest retail groups, driving growth across supermarket, department store, and specialty divisions. 
•  Directed digital transformation initiatives — expanding online visibility through social media, targeted ads, and e-commerce collaborations. 
•  Oversaw advertising, public relations, and promotions to enhance customer engagement and seasonal sales performance. 
•  Managed cross-functional coordination between merchandising, operations, and procurement teams to align marketing initiatives with sales goals. 
•  Designed and implemented loyalty programs and in-store activation strategies to boost customer retention and basket size. 
•  Analyzed consumer trends and campaign ROI to optimize spend efficiency and product mix strategies. 
•  Supervised creative production (visual merchandising, signage, collateral, digital content) to maintain consistent brand identity across branches. 
•  Led and mentored a team of marketing officers and creatives to execute campaigns across multiple retail locations.

workHistory.title: Unit Manager
workHistory.achievements:
•  Oversaw account management activities including billing inquiries, policy adjustments, and renewals to maintain high levels of client satisfaction. 
•  Conducted thorough policy reviews for existing clients, identifying gaps in coverage and recommending appropriate solutions. 
•  Conducted comprehensive policy audits for clients, ensuring proper documentation and compliance with regulatory requirements. 
•  Mentored junior consultants, providing guidance on best practices for client relations and policy analysis. 
•  Assessed clients'' needs by conducting in-depth interviews, gathering information on assets, liabilities, and potential risks.

workHistory.title: Coordinator
workHistory.company: Optum, UnitedHealth Group - Appeals and Grievances
workHistory.achievements:
•  Remained knowledgeable regarding company policies and procedures and current developments within operational departments. 
•  Improved member satisfaction by efficiently managing and resolving appeals and grievances cases. 
•  Contributed to organizational goals by consistently meeting or exceeding established performance metrics related to appeals and grievances management. 
•  Maintained strict confidentiality of sensitive member information while adhering to HIPAA regulations during case investigations. 
•  Demonstrated high-level attention to detail when reviewing medical records, provider contracts, and other relevant documents during case assessments.

rightsToWork.answer: Require Australian sponsorship to work for a new employer (e.g. 482, 457)

workHistory.title: Management Adviser
workHistory.company: Bacolod City and Negros Occidental based Co's
workHistory.achievements:
Provides consulting services to top management of companies that engaged in fuel and petroleum products distribution, medicines and medical supplies distribution, quarry (lime) and wood chips productions, food manufacturing and retail, construction, hospitals and other related healthcare facilities including diagnostics centers, to improve organizational efficiency, effectiveness, and resource utilization to achieve business goals. Key areas and functions are: 
•  Financial Management & Advisory 
•  Strategic Planning 
•  Operational Improvement 
•  Risk Management 
•  Implementation Support

workHistory.title: Finance Role
workHistory.achievements:
Manage the group's overall financial health, including budgeting, financial reporting, risk management, and strategic planning. Lead the group accounting and finance teams, ensure regulatory compliance, and advise the President & CEO and the Board on investment decisions and cost-saving opportunities. Key responsibilities are: 
•  Financial Strategy & Planning 
•  Financial Reporting & Analysis 
•  Risk Management & Compliance 
•  Treasury & Cash Flow Management 
•  Team Leadership & Optimization 
•  Procurement and Asset Management

workHistory.title: Accounting and Financial Manager
workHistory.achievements:
Handles all financial operations at a local branch, ensuring accurate reporting, compliance, and cash flow management. Key roles include leading accounting staff, managing budgets, reconciling accounts, processing payroll, and providing financial analysis to support strategic decision-making and ensure profitability. This function bridges the gap between branch office operations and head office, maintaining the financial health of the branch. Key responsibilities are: 
•  Financial Reporting and Analysis 
•  Accounting Operations 
•  Budgeting and Forecasting 
•  Internal Controls and Compliance 
•  Team Leadership 
•  Audit Management 
•  Cash Management

workHistory.title: Audit Staff
workHistory.achievements: •  Carry out external audit activity to clients of the company in conformity with the Philippine Standards of Auditing.

workHistory.title: Internal Audit Staff
workHistory.achievements:
Supports senior auditors by executing foundational audit procedures, preparing working papers, and examining financial records to ensure compliance and accuracy. Key duties include reconciling accounts, verifying assets/liabilities, documenting findings, and assisting in audit planning and risk assessment under supervision. Responsibilities and duties are: 
•  Fieldwork Execution 
•  Documentation & Reporting 
•  Compliance & Risk 
•  Data Collection & Communication 
•  Team Support

workHistory.title: Inventory Staff
workHistory.achievements:
Monitor levels of inventory of all items on a regular basis.
Informs the superior when the inventory level reaches re-order point.
Manages the handling and stocking of inventories.

-Developed effective audit quality control and procedures. -Responsible for overall internal audit of the company, and preparing audit reports. -Review of daily collection report and deposits. -Examine disbursements, payroll, commissions, incentives, assets and other audit routines as

workHistory.title: Chief Accountant
workHistory.achievements:
-Responsible for the overall accounting requirements of the company, areas of responsibility include (but are not limited to) financial accounting, cash management, timely financial report generation and presentation. -Prepare and analyze financial and management reports to assist management in decision 
making. -Prepare financial statements in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles and 
concepts. -Responsible for timely and accurate filing and payment of national and local taxes, and successful recovery of VAT input. Also responsible for facilitating internal and external tax audits. 
-Responsible for the strict implementation of the organization's accounting procedures, preparation of timely financial statements and reports, and maintenance of accounting records. -Determines proper handling of financial transactions and approves transactions within 
designated limits. 
-Supervises accurate financial entries, documents, and reports. -Supervise, monitor, train and evaluate job performance of accounting staff. 
-Prepare for monthly and annual tax reporting and compliance. -Keeps management informed of area activities and of any significant problems.

workHistory.title: Management Officer
workHistory.achievements:
-Manage the company's financial cash flow, make financial plans, and ensure adequate funding for all approved projects. -Liaise with other department for data inputs needed to produce accurate management reports 
within the defined deadlines. -Ensures timely submission of management report. -Closely coordinates with operations group and receivable management department for cash inflow realization and property development team for the house construction. 
-Responsible for financial management and monitoring of specific projects. -Monitor the use of resources and progress of projects by certifying availability of funds against financial resources. 
-Checking financial and progress reports and querying discrepancies. -Providing input to monthly statistics of trust resources to keep track of resources flows. 
-Providing reports on income and expenditures against trust resources for meetings of the Board of Directors of the company. -Requesting finance section to disburse funds to implementing bodies in line with project requirements. -Prepares weekly bank reconciliation statement. -Ensures that all disbursement are within the approved budget and in accordance with the 
company policy. -Performing other duties as may be required.

workHistory.title: Accountant
workHistory.achievements:
-Provides over-all leadership in the whole of Finance/Accounting operations of the company and 
responsible in providing timely and accurate quantitative information in support of business directions and management objectives. -Responsible for the management of cash. -Check and updating the books of company and ensuring that a company's financial statements reflect fairly and consistently the operations of the company. -Prepares, verifies and reports the receivables on a monthly basis. -Work closely with local bank staff to ensure accurate records and transactions. 
-Preparing, reviewing, and submitting monthly financial reports to the president of the company. -Perform month & year end closing. -Preparation of monthly bank reconciliation. -Review and post entries from source documents. 
-Prepares BIR reports (particularly Value Added Tax & Income Tax Return). -Responsible for external and internal audit administration. 
-Management and development of company. -Performing other duties as may be required.

workHistory.title: Chief Accountant
workHistory.achievements:
-Coordinate various activities in order to meet compliance, deadlines and exercise control and 
provide timely management information. -Provide direction and leadership to the accounting team. -Review and monitoring of treasury reports (cash flows, cash position, accounts receivable, accounts payable, bank reconciliation, and advances). -Prepare monthly reports of accounts receivable & payable & follow up the debtors outstanding. 
-Assists the Chief Financial Officer in the coordination of annual external audit. -Ensures compliance with government and private agencies laws and regulations. -Assists in the development of financial reports. -Records, classifies, and summarizes financial transactions and events in accordance with 
generally accepted accounting principles. -Ensures that all disbursements are within the approved budget and in accordance with the 
company policy. -Reviews and checks entries to the general ledger. -Prepares BIR and other government regulatory requirements. -Assists the Chief Financial Officer on related functions.

workHistory.title: Head of Accounting
workHistory.company: Kartek, Inc. (Automotive Dealership and Service Center)
workHistory.achievements:
-Overall responsible for all accounting, finance, payroll and administration of human resources matters of the company. -Accountable for financial reporting, costing, accounts payable, receivables, payroll, taxation and 
statutory reports for all aspects of the business. -Review and monitoring of treasury reports (cash flows, cash position. Accounts payable, accounts receivable, bank reconciliation, and advances). -Coordinate various activities in order to meet compliance, deadlines, and exercise control and 
provide timely management information. -Maintain the overall cost effectiveness of the company. -Responsible for managing the inventory. -Handle banking facilities and loan schedules. 
-Coordinating with external auditors and government agencies. -Responsible for managing human resources functions such as compensation and benefits, employee and labor relations, organizational development and training, and manpower planning and strategic staffing.

workHistory.title: Accounting Supervisor
workHistory.achievements:
-Perform general accounting duties, tax obligations and record maintenance and various administrative services. -Reviews and analyzes monthly financial statements and management reports. -Handle statutory requirements expanded withholding tax, value added tax, fringe benefits, summary of sales and purchases. -Prepares and submits relevant and accurate financial reports in a timely manner. 
-Responsible on supervising accounting staff on all assignments related to general accounting. -Implement effective inventory management to ensure continuous availability of parts and 
supplies. -Handle the control of critical expenses. -Handle adjusting, reclassifying journal entries. -Monitor car inventories. -Reviews payroll, bank reconciliation and reconciliation of various balance sheet accounts. -Maintain the books of accounts. 
-Maintain subsidiary ledgers. -Handle corporate income tax reports. -In charge of cost accounting. -Reviews and checks entries to the general ledger. -Ensures that all disbursement is within the approved budget and in accordance with the 
company policy.

workHistory.title: Store Manager
workHistory.achievements:
-Responsible for attaining sales objectives through effective store operations and personnel administration, and handles general accounting, cash management, preparation and analysis of financial statements, budgeting and cost control as well as preparation of government reports. -Responsible for sales accounting and accounts receivable management. -In-charge of cost accounting, auditing and processing of disbursements. 
-Preparation of accounting entries and maintenance of general ledger. -Ensures timely reporting of operating results. -Maintain responsibility of keeping the products up to date. 
-Responsible for monitoring and controlling disbursements and receivables. -Handle taxation specifically withholding tax, value added tax, and corporate income tax. -Handle government reports for SSS and BIR. -Handle store sales and profit objective. -Manage and supervise a store operation.

3. Due Process Requirement
     * Right to Due Process
     * Notice of Discrepancy
